summary.api_key_leak: llm_utils.py:133,136 — prints client.api_key to stdout on error

criticals.title: API key printed to stdout on every API error and retry

high.title: Unsafe pickle.load on checkpoint files — arbitrary code execution
trust_remote_code=True in model loading — arbitrary code from HuggingFace
Placeholder API keys as argparse defaults invite hardcoding

novel_concepts.skill_bank: Dynamic collection of meta-cognitive memory management skills (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP + evolved specializations)
novel_concepts.skill_evolution: 3-stage LLM-driven: failure mining → analysis+reflection → refinement. Triggered every N epochs.
novel_concepts.memory_construction: PPO controller selects top-K skills per text span → Executor prompts LLM with skills+memories → MemoryBank applies actions
novel_concepts.dual_embeddings: Each memory item has retriever embedding (for QA) + state encoder embedding (for controller input)
